channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jazz blow 20-point lead to Spurs, lose fourth straight
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (AP) - Harrison Barnes had 25 points and 10 rebounds, rookie Stephon Castle scored 18 points and the San Antonio Spurs rallied to defeat the Utah Jazz 126-118 on Thursday night for their second straight win without Victor Wembanyama.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jeremy Roach rescues No. 13 Baylor with buzzer-beater in 5th game after standout 4 years at Duke
item.description: NASSAU, Bahamas (AP) — Jeremy Roach reached a Final Four and won Atlantic Coast Conference regular-season and tournament titles during four productive years at Duke. It didn't take him long to create a memorable moment with his new team.
item.dc:creator: MIKE BARBER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Nick Chubb plows through heavy snow for 2-yard TD, giving Browns 24-19 win over Steelers
item.description: Nick Chubb ran for a 2-yard touchdown in heavy snow with 57 seconds left, and the Cleveland Browns stunned division rival Pittsburgh 24-19, ending the Steelers’ five-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Tom Withers, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: President Biden welcomes 2024 NBA champion Boston Celtics to White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The White House was tinted green on Thursday, when President Joe Biden — Secret Service code name: Celtic — welcomed “Coach Joe” Mazzulla and the Boston Celtics to the South Lawn to celebrate the franchise’s unprecedented 18th NBA championship.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Corner Canyon wins back-to-back 6A championships
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Corner Canyon dynasty continues. The Chargers won their second straight 6A state championship, and fourth in the last six years, with a hard-fought 30-27 win over Lone Peak, avenging their lone loss in the regular season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Shohei Ohtani wins third MVP award, first in NL. Aaron Judge earns second AL honor in 3 seasons
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Shohei Ohtani keeps setting records, even after the season is over. The Los Angeles Dodgers star added his third Most Valuable Player award to his collection and first in the National League when he was chosen unanimously by the Baseball Writers' Association of America on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brock Purdy's status for the 49ers in doubt this week because of sore shoulder
item.description: San Francisco 49ers quarterback Brock Purdy has been limited in practice this week because of a sore throwing shoulder and will likely be a game-time decision for Sunday’s game at Green Bay.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mike Evans trending towards playing against the Giants on Sunday
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers are looking to get back on track after four straight losses against the Giants, who swapped starting quarterbacks after losing five in a row.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utes hope to end six-game slide against Iowa State
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah football team will try to end its longest losing streak in 22 years when they take on #22 Iowa State Saturday in their home finale at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: First images of new Ryan Field released: See photos
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. — Northwestern University and the family that's supported the majority of the funding and planning for the new Ryan Field are billing it as a "sports and entertainment venue set to become a landmark for college football and Chicago." Now, the public can get its first look.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Southwest employee welcomes Chiefs fans by playing Bills song over intercom
item.description: She said she wanted to let Chiefs fans know that "the Buffalo Bills have the best fans in the league.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Minkewicz, NewsNation

item.title: Beyoncé performing at halftime of NFL Christmas Day game on Netflix
item.description: Beyoncé is coming to your home on Christmas — provided you have Netflix and are tuning in to the Baltimore Ravens-Houston Texans game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz comeback falls short against Clippers, 116-105
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - James Harden moved into second place on the NBA's career 3-point list and had 20 points and 11 assists to help the Los Angeles Clippers beat the Utah Jazz 116-105 on Sunday night to end a three-game losing streak. Harden moved past Ray Allen with No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Trump attends UFC championship fight in New York, taking break from Cabinet picks
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump walked out to a roaring standing ovation just ahead of the start of the UFC pay-per-view card at Madison Square Garden on Saturday night, combining two things close to his heart: fierce battles inside the octagon and New York City.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz unable to hold fourth quarter lead in loss to Kings
item.description: SACRAMENTO (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring 60 points in a losing effort the night before, De'Aaron Fox scored 49 points to lead the Sacramento Kings to a 121-117 win over the Utah Jazz on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jump around: Cavaliers improve to 14-0, celebrate by dancing with frog mascot
item.description: They continued their perfect start, improving to 14-0 on Friday night with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls in an NBA Cup opener that served as another showcase for a Cavs team clicking like never before.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 37, Cavaliers stay perfect and improve to 14-0 with 144-126 win over Bulls
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored a season-high 37 points, Darius Garland had 29 and the Cleveland Cavaliers continued one of the best starts in league history, improving to 14-0 with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night in an NBA Cup game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Nuggets star Nikola Jokic and coach Michael Malone miss game against Pelicans for personal reasons
item.description: The Denver Nuggets were without star center Nikola Jokic and coach Michael Malone for their NBA Cup opener Friday night against the New Orleans Pelicans.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5
